title: Applicability
doc_html:
§561.1. Applicability

The provisions of this Chapter shall apply to any person convicted, on or after August 15, 2006, of a sex offense as defined in R.S. 15:541 when the victim is under the age of thirteen years.

Acts 2006, No. 242, §1.
